name: Maple Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the brown sugar, melted butter or margarine, and maple flavoring.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
3. Combine the flour and baking powder; add to the egg mixture.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until the brownies are done.
7. Allow the brownies to cool.
8. Dust with confectioners' sugar if desired.
